# ddcutil fixtures

The MSI/BOE fixtures are redacted reconstructions of the block ordering reported
for the owner's Ubuntu 22.04 machine. They exercise the confirmed parser failure,
but they are not represented as the owner's byte-for-byte capture.

Before declaring the real MSI regression evidence complete, replace or supplement
these fixtures with the owner's exact redacted `ddcutil detect` output and record
its capture date, ddcutil version, selected bus, and expected selector here.
